Fusion.title: Fusion
Fusion.description: A generated anime fusion image with metadata.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate the image.

series.description: The series combined in this fusion.

imageUrl.description: The base64 data URI of the generated image.

authorId.description: The user ID of the creator, if authenticated.

isAutoDream.description: Whether this fusion was generated automatically by the Auto Dream service.
